faqs.question: What pests are most common in Lawrence, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Lawrence residents commonly encounter ants, rodents, termites, cockroaches, and mosquitoes. Due to our coastal location, moisture-loving pests like silverfish and carpenter ants are particularly prevalent. Our general pest control service addresses all common household pests with targeted treatments.

faqs.question: How much does general pest control cost in Lawrence?
faqs.answer: General pest control in Lawrence typically ranges from $175 to $300, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Most residential properties fall within this range for comprehensive quarterly service.

faqs.question: Is pest control safe for my family and pets in Lawrence?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We can discuss pet-safe and organic options during your consultation, and we'll provide specific safety instructions for your Lawrence home.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pest control service in Lawrence?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Lawrence and the Five Towns area. Emergency pest situations receive priority scheduling. Simply call us in the morning, and we'll typically have a technician at your Lawrence property the same day to assess and treat your pest problem.
